CREATE TABLE formatted_dates AS SELECT event_date, sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%D %d.%m.%Y') AS formatted_str FROM dates;
SELECT * FROM formatted_dates WHERE formatted_str LIKE '%22%';
SELECT event_date, sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM dates WHERE event_date >= DATE '2000-01-01' AND event_date <= DATE '2023-12-31';
SELECT sys.date_to_str(d1.event_date, '%A, %d %B %Y') AS long_format, d2.event_date FROM dates d1 JOIN dates d2 ON d1.event_date < d2.event_date;
SELECT sys.date_to_str((SELECT MIN(event_date) FROM dates), '%d/%m/%Y') AS min_date_format;
SELECT sys.date_to_str(DATE '2023-02-28', '%Y') || ' - Week ' || EXTRACT(WEEK FROM DATE '2023-02-28') AS year_and_week;
